title: Lead Instructional Designer at Allen Career Institute

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Allen Career Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Instructional Designer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
